backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a candle store backend, defining types and CRUD operations for user profiles, products, cart, wishlist, rewards, reviews, orders, and support requests, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to their implementing frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs for the candle store application.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend page file paths to one-sentence descriptions covering ProductDetail, Cart, Checkout, PaymentSuccess, PaymentFailure, Wishlist, Rewards, CustomerCare, and AdminPage.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (product listing, detail, cart, checkout, payment, wishlist, rewards, customer care, auth, and admin) wrapped in a theme provider and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Chatbot.tsx: Floating chatbot widget component that renders a toggleable chat panel with message history, typing indicator, and rule-based bot responses via a utility function.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Contact form component with validation for name, email, subject, and message fields that submits a support request to the backend and shows a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Renders a collapsible accordion FAQ section with eight hardcoded questions and answers covering candle types, burn times, safety, shipping, returns, care, gift wrapping, and loyalty rewards.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, cart/wishlist badge counts, login/logout via Internet Identity, admin link, profile setup modal trigger, and a chatbot component.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSetup.tsx: Admin dialog for configuring Stripe payments by entering a secret key and allowed countries, showing a confirmation state if Stripe is already configured.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product as a card with image, category badge, wishlist button, out-of-stock overlay, and an add-to-cart button that updates the cart via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible dialog shown to newly authenticated users to collect and save their name, email, and phone number as a profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ReviewList.tsx: Renders a list of product reviews sorted by newest first, with an average star rating summary and an exported reusable StarRating component.
frontend/src/components/WishlistButton.t: A toggle button component that adds or removes a product from the user's wishlist, showing a heart icon and requiring authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend data operations including products, cart, wishlist, user profile, reviews, support requests, and shopping lists.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for a violet/pink/blue candle-themed palette, and adds custom animations like a candle flicker effect.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: An admin dashboard page for managing products (add, edit, delete) and configuring Stripe payments, with access restricted to admin users authenticated via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Displays the shopping cart page with a list of cart items (each fetching its own product details), quantity controls, remove buttons, and an order summary with total and checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Renders the checkout page with a shipping address form, order summary, and Stripe checkout session creation, redirecting to Stripe's hosted payment page on submission.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerCare.tsx: Displays the customer care page with contact cards (phone, email, location), a contact form, live chat support hours, and an FAQ section.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Renders the login page with Google/Internet Identity login and an email/password form that both delegate to the Internet Identity login flow.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Shows a payment failure page listing common failure reasons and providing action buttons to retry checkout, return to cart, or contact support.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays an order confirmation page with a success animation, post-order steps (email, preparation, shipping, delivery), a loyalty points notice, and navigation buttons to continue shopping or view rewards.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a single product's details including images, price, stock, and reviews, with functionality to add to cart and submit reviews using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Shows a hero banner and a filterable, searchable grid of candle products with category filter chips and a product count indicator.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Registration page with a form for name, email, phone, and password that delegates actual authentication to Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/pages/Rewards.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's loyalty points balance, tier status, available rewards to redeem, and points transaction history.
frontend/src/pages/Wishlist.tsx: Shows the user's saved wishlist items as cards with options to move items to the cart or remove them, fetching each product's details individually.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines keyword-based response rules for a Luminary Candles chatbot, mapping user input keywords (greetings, product queries, shipping, returns, etc.) to predefined response strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining state like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the candle e-commerce app, extending the theme with custom brand colors (violet, pink, blue using oklch), typography fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for a full-stack animated candles e-commerce app, documenting existing features, architectural notes, image requirements, and versioning metadata for features like auth, cart, payments, chatbot, and loyalty program.
